About Georg

Training & Community Advocate

As a passionate IT Support Engineer with 10 years of experience, I'm driven by a mission to empower teams and communities through knowledge sharing and process optimization. My focus lies in bridging the gap between technical excellence and accessible learning.

What I Do

🎓 Training & Development

Design and deliver comprehensive training programs, workshops, and materials to upskill support teams and extend expertise across organizations.

🏘️ Community Building

Active contributor to professional communities and knowledge networks. Speaker at industry events sharing best practices, insights, and practical solutions.

📚 Knowledge Management

KCS-certified specialist in building scalable knowledge systems. Creator of self-service content and documentation that reduces support costs and empowers users.

🔧 Process Optimization

Developer of tools and frameworks that streamline support workflows, improve efficiency, and enable teams to focus on what matters most.

Specializations

Linux Administration Knowledge-Centered Service (KCS) Technical Training Community Engagement Process Design Coaching & Mentoring Technical Documentation Customer Success

Beyond Work

When I'm not crafting training materials or speaking at community events, you'll find me exploring Arduino projects, experimenting with Linux systems, or discovering the best Middle Eastern cuisine. I believe that learning is a lifelong journey, and I'm always excited to explore new technologies and share what I discover.

Let's Connect

Interested in collaborating on training initiatives, community projects, or knowledge-sharing endeavors? I'd love to hear from you.

Get in touch Connect on LinkedIn

"Be excellent to each other"
